title: Dimension Pagination (response + request parameters)
description: Profile of OGC API - Common Part 2 pagination (OGC 19-072) for dimension members served as Records. Request parameters `limit` and `offset` are constrained below; responses wrap dimension-member records in a FeatureCollection with numberMatched/numberReturned and paging links.
$comment: Normative reference: OGC API - Common - Part 2: Geospatial Data (OGC 19-072), https://docs.ogc.org/is/19-072/19-072.html. Official parameter definitions: https://schemas.opengis.net/ogcapi/common/part2/1.0/openapi/parameters/ (limit.yaml, bbox.yaml). This schema restates the `limit` and `offset` semantics in JSON Schema for validation convenience; in case of divergence, the OGC Common Part 2 definitions are authoritative.

limit.description: Maximum number of dimension members per page. Aligns with OGC API - Common Part 2 `limit` parameter (integer, minimum 1). Servers MAY enforce a smaller maximum via the `default` / `maximum` values advertised in the OpenAPI document; this schema caps at 10000 as a sanity bound.

offset.description: Zero-based starting position in the generated member sequence. Aligns with the `offset` parameter used by OGC API - Common Part 2 implementations for cursorless pagination over ordered sequences.

numberMatched.description: Total number of dimension members matching the query within the dimension's extent. Semantics per OGC API - Features Part 1 §7.15.3 (carried forward by OGC Common Part 2).

numberReturned.description: Number of members in this response page.
